evidence_summary: Demonstrate Carter's physical prowess and tactical ingenuity.

Carter performs a dangerous climb up the Zodangan barracks, uses a hook and strap to reach the roof, and subdues a sentry. He binds the guard and hangs him over the ledge to buy time before his escape.
